reopen_rule: Satisfied lower gates may only be reopened by current regression receipt.

current_bounded_limitations.note: Gate C exit proved live > baseline under bounded law. It did not authorize civilization activation, externality widening, frontier claims, or product widening.

authorized_decision_questions: Does KT remain a bounded governed execution system at the post-Gate-C posture, or is a bounded B04 civilization-ratification attempt authorized?

claim_boundary: This packet freezes post-Gate-C reality so Gate D can be decided without ambiguity. It does not authorize B04 mutation, externality widening, frontier claims, comparator expansion, or product widening.
